name: aerograph
description: Open-source flight recorder for AI agent workflows.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @aerograph/contracts -w @aerograph/sdk -w @aerograph/adapter-langchain -w @aerograph/schema-exporter -w @aerograph/otel -w apps-collector -w apps-demo -w apps-web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @aerograph/contracts -w @aerograph/sdk -w @aerograph/adapter-langchain -w @aerograph/schema-exporter -w @aerograph/otel && npm run --workspaces --if-present test
scripts.schema:export: npm run build -w @aerograph/contracts -w @aerograph/schema-exporter && npm run schema:export -w @aerograph/schema-exporter
scripts.schema:check: npm run build -w @aerograph/contracts -w @aerograph/schema-exporter && npm run schema:check -w @aerograph/schema-exporter
scripts.drift:check: npm run schema:check && echo 'Schema drift check passed.'
